rows.title: Shinjuku Gyoen National Garden
rows.notes: Seek out the wooden bridge at the southern end of the English Landscape Garden.
rows.planning_note: Perfect first stop after checking in, offering serene views and gentle introductions to local flora without strenuous walking. Start from the Shinjuku entrance.

rows.title: Lunch at Menya Musashi, Shinjuku
rows.planning_note: Famous for traditional tonkotsu ramen, great for a hearty start. Located conveniently near your sightseeing spots.

rows.title: Senso-ji Temple
rows.notes: For a unique perspective, head to the Asakusa Shrine behind. Enjoy serene gardens with seasonal colors.
rows.planning_note: Midday's a good time to catch the vibrant temple grounds, balancing historic ambiance and lively local shops.

rows.title: Dinner at Omoide Yokocho, Shinjuku
rows.planning_note: Explore an array of small, nostalgic eateries specializing in yakitori, perfect for an immersive local dining experience.

rows.title: Yanaka: Tokyo's Living History
rows.notes: Explore tranquil alleyways and find hidden gardens offering unique views.
rows.planning_note: Ideal for a morning stroll when the area is just waking up, offering a quaint start to the day away from the city's rush.

rows.title: Akihabara Pop Culture Pilgrimage
rows.notes: Visit the Yodobashi Akiba store for unique anime merchandise usually missed by tourists.
rows.planning_note: Visit the stores that open mid-morning for a varied selection without being swamped by early-morning commuters.

rows.title: Lunch at Ichiran Ramen, Akihabara
rows.planning_note: Famed vending-machine selection process allows customization, while booths provide unique privacy, perfect for solo dining.

rows.title: Edo-Tokyo Museum Visit
rows.notes: Explore replicas and exhibits showcasing Tokyo's evolution from Edo period to present day.
rows.planning_note: Spend the cooler afternoon indoors, avoiding potential rain and appreciating the intricate displays without daytime crowds.

rows.title: Dinner at Kagaya, Shinjuku
rows.planning_note: Discover experimental izakaya dining offering thrilling local flavors, right in the heart of Shinjuku.

rows.title: Izakaya Crawl in Shinjuku
rows.notes: End your evening sampling yakitori with seasonal specialties like quail eggs.
rows.planning_note: A perfect close to the day's activities with a laid-back, sociable atmosphere sampling local favorites.

rows.title: Tsukiji Outer Market
rows.notes: Discover freshly grilled street food in tucked-away alleys.
rows.planning_note: Start early to experience the bustling market with fresh wares and fewer crowds; taste savory local foods in hidden spots most visitors miss.

rows.title: Brunch at Sushi Dai, Tsukiji
rows.planning_note: Enjoy incredibly fresh sushi with expertly prepared fish in a renowned location, perfect for sushi enthusiasts willing to queue for quality.

rows.title: Mokuhankan: Craft Your Own Ukiyo-e
rows.notes: Observe and participate in a detailed woodblock printing workshop.
rows.planning_note: A delightful hands-on experience perfect for arts enthusiasts; offers a deeper appreciation of Japan's rich artisanal heritage.

rows.title: Kaiseki Dinner at Kanda Yabu Soba
rows.planning_note: Engage in a multi-course traditional Japanese dining experience that showcases seasonal ingredients and delicate flavors in an intimate setting.

rows.title: Mount Fuji Excursion
rows.notes: Head to the less frequented Oishi Park for best views of Mt. Fuji with seasonal flowers.
rows.planning_note: Early departure ensures a full day to explore Mount Fuji's iconic landscapes, with ample time for hikes and photography at serene vista points away from crowds.

rows.title: Dinner at Gonpachi, Shibuya
rows.planning_note: End your day's adventure with delicious Japanese fusion dishes in a lively setting inspired by 'Kill Bill' aesthetics. Conveniently offers group seating.

rows.title: Tokyo Skytree
rows.notes: For sunset views transitioning into night at the open-air deck.
rows.planning_note: Visit early to start the day with spectacular skyline views, avoiding potential afternoon crowd and humidity buildup.

rows.title: Lunch at Tonkatsu Maisen, Omotesando
rows.planning_note: Celebrated for its juicy tonkatsu offerings, this lunch spot is perfect for a hearty meal amidst your Tokyo adventure.

rows.title: Explore Odaiba
rows.notes: Head to Aqua City's rooftop for stunning Rainbow Bridge views.
rows.planning_note: Perfect example of Tokyo's futuristic side; enjoy sunset over Tokyo Bay, optimizing views post-lunch.

rows.title: Dinner at Sushi Saito, Roppongi
rows.planning_note: Savor an upscale sushi experience with a Michelin-starred chef in Roppongi, perfect for the culinary enthusiast.

rows.title: Breakfast at Ichiran Ramen, Shinjuku
rows.planning_note: Perfect for a last Tokyo breakfast — order vending-machine style for quick service; the broth is renowned for flavor.

rows.title: Check-out and travel to the airport

change_log: No changes — itinerary passed all 10 checks.
